title: initiative.* status-change event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.6. Produced by epd2_initiative_service.events.initiative_state_payload, shared verbatim by ten distinct event_type builders that all serialize the identical Initiative state snapshot: build_draft_created_event (initiative.draft_created), build_submitted_event (initiative.submitted), build_revision_requested_event (initiative.revision_requested), build_published_event (initiative.published), build_qualified_event (initiative.qualified), build_deliberation_started_event (initiative.deliberation_started), build_legal_review_requested_event (initiative.legal_review_requested), build_ready_for_ballot_event (initiative.ready_for_ballot), build_initiative_withdrawn_event (initiative.withdrawn), build_archived_event (initiative.archived). Consolidated into one payload schema file per the task's own consolidation rule: verified by reading events.py, every one of these builders calls the shared private _build_initiative_event helper with payload=initiative_state_payload(initiative) and differs only in event_type.
